experience.organization: Muljibhai Patel Urological Hospital (MPUH), Nadiad, Gujarat
experience.description: Writing Statistical Analysis Plan according to the objectives of study as provided by doctors for their research projects. Preparing master file into analyzable form. Analysis of hospital data with the help of different software like SPSS, R-Language and MEDCALC as per the Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP). Making Graphics using software like SPSS, MS EXCEL, R-Language and MS POWERPOINT. Reporting and interpreting the outcome of the analysis. Writing and reviewing in statistical part of DNB projects, Company Grants, Govt. Projects

Guided 93 various projects regarding Statistics, Six Sigma, ISO, Marketing research, 5S implementation and seven quality control tools implementation in industry. Taught statistics subjects (Marketing Research, Design of Experiments, Statistical Quality Control and Reliability, Multivariate techniques, Business Statistics etc.). Also taught practicals based on Excel, Minitb, SPSS and R-language. Worked as academic incharge and Project as well as job placement incharge. Organized different International/National/State level Workshop/seminar/training program. Provided consultancy to Students (researcher) from various department of university.
